debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_4
mα : MeasurableSpace α
inst✝² : DiscreteMeasurableSpace α
inst✝¹ : Fintype α
f g : α → ℝ
p q : ENNReal
inst✝ : p.HolderConjugate q
⊢ wInner cWeight f g ≤ ↑‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ↑‖g‖ₙ_[q]

failed_attempts: wInner_cWeight_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLpNorm' p q f g
inner_le_Lp_mul_Lq_of_cWeight _ f g

calc ⟪f, g⟫ₙ_[ℝ] ≤ ⟪fun a ↦ ‖f a‖, fun a ↦ ‖g a‖⟫ₙ_[ℝ] := by
        simp only [wInner_cWeight_eq_expect]
        apply expect_le_expect
        intro a
        simp only [Pi.mul_apply]
        exact le_trans (le_abs_self _) (abs_mul_le _ _)
    _ = ‖f * g‖ₙ_[1] := (cL1Norm_mul f g).symm
    _ ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] := cL1Norm_mul_le f g

calc ⟪f, g⟫ₙ_[ℝ] ≤ ⟪fun a ↦ |f a|, fun a ↦ |g a|⟫ₙ_[ℝ] := by
      simp only [wInner_cWeight_eq_expect]
      apply expect_le_expect
      intro a _
      exact le_trans (le_abs_self _) (abs_mul_le _ _)
    _ = ‖|f| * |g|‖ₙ_[1] := by
      rw [cL1Norm_mul_of_nonneg (fun _ ↦ abs_nonneg _) (fun _ ↦ abs_nonneg _)]
      simp only [abs_abs]
    _ ≤ ‖|f|‖ₙ_[p] * ‖|g|‖ₙ_[q] := cL1Norm_mul_le (|f|) (|g|)
    _ = ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] := by simp only [cLpNorm_abs]

calc ⟪f, g⟫ₙ_[ℝ] ≤ ⟪fun i ↦ ‖f i‖, fun i ↦ ‖g i‖⟫ₙ_[ℝ] := wInner_cWeight_le_wInner_cWeight_abs
    _ = ‖f * g‖ₙ_[1] := (cL1Norm_mul f g).symm
    _ ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] := cL1Norm_mul_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLqNorm p q f g

calc ⟪f, g⟫ₙ_[ℝ] ≤ ⟪fun i ↦ ‖f i‖, fun i ↦ ‖g i‖⟫ₙ_[ℝ] := wInner_cWeight_le_wInner_cWeight_norm
    _ = ‖f * g‖ₙ_[1] := (cL1Norm_mul f g).symm
    _ ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] := cLpNorm_mul_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLpNorm p q f g

calc ⟪f, g⟫ₙ_[ℝ] ≤ ⟪fun i ↦ ‖f i‖, fun i ↦ ‖g i‖⟫ₙ_[ℝ] := by

        gcongr with i

    _ = ‖f * g‖ₙ_[1] := (cL1Norm_mul f g).symm

calc ⟪f, g⟫ₙ_[ℝ] ≤ ⟪fun i ↦ ‖f i‖, fun i ↦ ‖g i‖⟫ₙ_[ℝ] := wInner_cWeight_le_wInner_cWeight_norm
    _ = ‖f * g‖ₙ_[1] := (cL1Norm_mul f g).symm
    _ ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] := cL1Norm_mul_le p q f g

rw [wInner_cWeight_eq_smul_wInner_one, cLpNorm_eq_card_rpow_mul_dLpNorm,
    cLpNorm_eq_card_rpow_mul_dLpNorm]
  simp only [NNReal.smul_def, smul_eq_mul, NNReal.coe_mul, NNReal.coe_rpow]
  have hp := ENNReal.HolderConjugate.pos_left (p := p)
  have hq := ENNReal.HolderConjugate.pos_right (p := p)
  have hpq := ENNReal.HolderConjugate.inv_add_inv_eq (p := p) (q := q)
  rw [mul_comm (↑(Fintype.card α) ^ (-p.toReal⁻¹) : ℝ), mul_assoc,
    ← mul_assoc (↑(Fintype.card α) ^ (-p.toReal⁻¹) : ℝ), ← Real.rpow_add (by positivity)]
  simp only [← hpq, neg_add_cancel, Real.rpow_zero, one_mul]
  gcongr
  exact wInner_one_le_dLpNorm_mul_dLpNorm p q f g

simp only [wInner_cWeight_eq_smul_wInner_one, cLpNorm_eq_smul_dLpNorm]
  rcases eq_or_ne (Fintype.card α) 0 with hα | hα
  · simp [Fintype.card_eq_zero_iff.mp hα]
  simp only [NNReal.smul_def, smul_eq_mul]
  have hp := ENNReal.HolderConjugate.symm (p := p) (q := q)
  have hpq : (p.toReal)⁻¹ + (q.toReal)⁻¹ = 1 := ENNReal.HolderConjugate.toReal_inv_add_toReal_inv
  rw [mul_comm ‖f‖_[p] _, mul_assoc]
  gcongr
  · exact wInner_one_nonneg (by positivity) (by positivity)
  · exact wInner_one_le_dLpNorm_mul_dLpNorm p q f g

      exact expect_le_expect fun a _ ↦ inner_le_iff.mpr (abs_mul_le _ _)
    _ = ‖f * g‖ₙ_[1] := (cL1Norm_mul f g).symm

          exact expect_le_expect fun i _ ↦ inner_le_weight_mul_Lp_of_norm_le (by positivity)

  calc ⟪f, g⟫ₙ_[ℝ] ≤ ⟪fun i ↦ ‖f i‖, fun i ↦ ‖g i‖⟫ₙ_[ℝ] := by
      simp only [wInner_cWeight_eq_expect]
      exact expect_le_expect fun i _ ↦ inner_le_iff.mpr (abs_inner_le_norm (𝕜 := ℝ) _ _)
    _ = ‖f * g‖ₙ_[1] := h.symm
    _ ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] := cL1Norm_mul_le _ _
wInner_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLpNorm p q f g

have h := wInner_one_le_dLpNorm_mul_dLpNorm (μ := .count) p q f g
  simp only [wInner_cWeight_eq_smul_wInner_one, cLpNorm_eq_card_rpow_mul_dLpNorm] at h ⊢
  by_cases hp : p = 0
  · simp [hp]
  by_cases hq : q = 0
  · simp [hq]
  by_cases hp' : p = ⊤
  · have hq' : q = 1 := ENNReal.HolderConjugate.one_of_top hp'
    simp only [hp', hq', ENNReal.top_ne_zero, ↓reduceDIte, one_ne_zero, ENNReal.one_ne_top,
      ENNReal.one_toReal, inv_one, NNReal.rpow_one]
    rw [NNRat.cast_smul_eq_nnqsmul ℝ, NNRat.smul_def, mul_comm]
    gcongr
    simp [dLpNorm_top, cLpNorm_top]
  by_cases hq' : q = ⊤
  · have hp'' : p = 1 := ENNReal.HolderConjugate.symm.one_of_top hq'
    simp only [hp'', hq', one_ne_zero, ↓reduceDIte, ENNReal.one_ne_top, ENNReal.one_toReal, inv_one,
      NNReal.rpow_one, ENNReal.top_ne_zero]
    rw [NNRat.cast_smul_eq_nnqsmul ℝ, NNRat.smul_def, mul_comm]
    gcongr
    simp [dLpNorm_top, cLpNorm_top]
  have hpq := ENNReal.HolderConjugate.inv_add_inv_eq_one (p := p) (q := q)
  rw [NNRat.cast_smul_eq_nnqsmul ℝ, NNRat.smul_def]
  calc _ ≤ (↑(Fintype.card α))⁻¹ * (dLpNorm p f .count * dLpNorm q g .count) := by
        rw [mul_comm]; gcongr
    _ = (↑(Fintype.card α))⁻¹ * dLpNorm p f .count * dLpNorm q g .count := by ring
    _ = (↑(Fintype.card α))⁻¹ * ((↑(Fintype.card α) : ℝ≥0) ^ p.toReal⁻¹ * ‖f‖ₙ_[p]) *
        ((↑(Fintype.card α) : ℝ≥0) ^ q.toReal⁻¹ * ‖g‖ₙ_[q]) := by
        simp only [hp', ↓reduceDIte, hp, hq', hq]
    _ = (↑(Fintype.card α))⁻¹ * (↑(Fintype.card α) : ℝ≥0) ^ p.toReal⁻¹ *
        (↑(Fintype.card α) : ℝ≥0) ^ q.toReal⁻¹ * ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] := by ring
    _ = ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] := by
        have : (↑(Fintype.card α))⁻¹ * (↑(Fintype.card α) : ℝ≥0) ^ p.toReal⁻¹ *
            (↑(Fintype.card α) : ℝ≥0) ^ q.toReal⁻¹ = 1 := by
          rw [← NNReal.rpow_add_of_pos (Fintype.card_pos), ← hpq]
          simp
        simp [this]

    _ = ‖f * g‖ₙ_[1] := (cL1Norm_mul f g).symm
    _ ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] := cL1Norm_mul_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLpNorm p q f g

    _ ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] := abs_wInner_cWeight_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLpNorm p q f g

calc ⟪f, g⟫ₙ_[ℝ] ≤ ⟪fun i ↦ ‖f i‖, fun i ↦ ‖g i‖⟫ₙ_[ℝ] := wInner_cWeight_le_wInner_cWeight_norm
    _ = ‖f * g‖ₙ_[1] := (cL1Norm_mul f g).symm

have h := wInner_one_cWeight_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLpNorm (𝕜 := ℝ) p q f g
  exact h

simp only [wInner_cWeight_eq_smul_wInner_one, cLpNorm_eq_smul_dLpNorm, NNReal.smul_def,
    smul_eq_mul, mul_mul_mul_comm]
  gcongr
  · rw [← NNReal.rpow_add (by positivity)]
    simp [ENNReal.HolderConjugate.inv_add_inv_eq_one]
  · exact wInner_one_le_dLpNorm_mul_dLpNorm p q f g
inner_le_Lp_mul_Lq_of_norm_cWeight cWeight f g p q
exact wInner_cWeight_le_cLNorm_mul_cLNorm p q f g

calc ⟪f, g⟫ₙ_[ℝ] ≤ ⟪fun a ↦ |f a|, fun a ↦ |g a|⟫ₙ_[ℝ] := by
        simp only [wInner_cWeight_eq_expect]
        apply expect_le_expect
        intro i _
        exact le_trans (le_abs_self _) (abs_mul_le _ _)
    _ = ‖|f| * |g|‖ₙ_[1] := by
        rw [cL1Norm_mul_of_nonneg (fun _ => abs_nonneg _) (fun _ => abs_nonneg _)]
        simp only [Pi.abs_apply, abs_abs]
    _ ≤ ‖|f|‖ₙ_[p] * ‖|g|‖ₙ_[q] := cL1Norm_mul_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLpNorm p q |f| |g|
    _ = ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] := by simp only [cLpNorm_abs]
